comparison: TM vs BERT on counterfactual IMDb
finding: BERT is substantially more robust than TM on counterfactual IMDb. TM degrades 30% while BERT degrades only 2.5%. This contradicts the hypothesis that TMs are more robust to counterfactual edits.
notes: Clean accuracy on 1000-sample subset for BERT (90.40%) vs full test set for TM (89.98%). Counterfactual test set has 488 samples. TM uses BoW features which are brittle to synonym/paraphrase rewrites.
